name: Ice slip outside work building in Salt Lake, whose fault?
description: Comp primary; sue property owner if negligent.

mainEntity.name: Ice slip outside work building in Salt Lake, whose fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp primary; sue property owner if negligent.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp if during duties; third-party if property mgr negligent.** Report as work injury.[1] Key factors: Who controls area? Weather records. Salting history. Multiple liable. Lawyer IDs parties.
